news.headline: Could China’s rare earth supplies dictate how long US strikes on Iran go on?
news.summary:
The US war against Iran may have handed Beijing some fresh rare-earths leverage over Washington, with roughly three weeks until US President Donald Trump’s expected visit to China.

news.headline: ‘Faster, cheaper, better’: 480MHz sold for $507m as 5G spectrum auction concludes
news.summary:
<p>The government completed its 5G spectrum auction in Islamabad on Tuesday, with 480 megahertz sold for $507 million at the end of the third round of bidding.</p>
